feat.effect: You demand power from the world, using your mask as a locus to force reality to bend to your will. You cast *manifestation* as a 10th-rank occult spell, but no matter what spell you emulate with it, that spell has the incapacitation trait.
feat.name: Living God
feat.text:
You have reached heights of power equaling Razmir’s himself. You can Craft your Razmiri mask out of porcelain laced with precious metals, or upgrade your existing mask to a porcelain one in the same time it takes to Craft one made of iron. A porcelain Razmiri mask grants a +4 item bonus to Deception checks to Lie or Feint, is an 18th-level item, and is an apex item that increases your Charisma modifier by 1 or increases it to +4, whichever would give you a higher score. It also gives you the following activation in addition to those granted by the standard, silver, and gold masks.  
  
**Activate—Power of the Living God** (concentrate, manipulate, occult)

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
